description: End-to-end gate for the City of Kwinana per the per-council recipe. Exercises split R-codes (R12.5/20).

recorded.method: verify_beeliar.py --address '14B CHAPMAN ROAD CALISTA' --other-council 'City of Cockburn'. Full run: reports/kwinana_canary_run.json. This canary exposed two structural bugs now fixed: duplicate parcels from overlapping bbox imports (111,823 rows deduped) and the R-code regex that never matched plain density codes (synth_facts.py).
recorded.decode_library: 759 approved scoped rules from 17 instruments (LPS2 405-chunk scheme text, LPS3 Town Centre, 13 LPPs incl. No. 14 Residential Development, strategy, structure plan). Pipeline: gpt-4o-mini decode (1,217+) -> gpt-4o correct (791 kept / 426 rejected) -> noise sweep (32) -> scope. 12 late mop-up rules parked pending correction (OpenAI quota).

faithfulness_audit.note: 1 majority flag (modality field 'mandatory' vs quote 'MAY BE REQUIRED'); corrected in place.

gaps: LPP 5 (public art) blocked: policy page 404s on all known slugs; note in target_manifest.notes.
LPP 12 (Mandogalup) marked out_of_scope: not on the council's current register; likely revoked.
